title: zealhmm
text: Analysis notebooks for recovering QTL from teosinte introgressions under low-coverage genotyping, across two maize×teosinte populations. Data provenance: DATA.html.

title: zealhmm
section: ZEAL / BZea — Zea Exotic Allele Library
text:
ZEAL / BZea — Zea Exotic Allele Library
B73 × teosinte BC2S3 near-isogenic lines; 5 teosinte taxa (Zx mexicana, Zv parviglumis, Zd diploperennis, Zl luxurians, Zh huehuetenangensis); SNP50K panel at ~0.4× skim. Built end-to-end from field books + skim counts: samplesheet → SpATS BLUEs → SNP50K dosage → RTIGER ancestry mosaic → K → JLM + MLM.

ZEAL/BZea DTA (days to anthesis) — MLM (Taxon + K) GWAS + JLM on the SNP50K panel


The ZEAL reproduction of the TeoNAM DTA composite: JLM QTL, per-SNP vs RTIGER-ancestry MLM, and the ancestry↔︎flowering confound, on 1,403 B73×teosinte BC2S3 NILs


2026-07-08






ZEAL/BZea DTA GWAS + JLM on the SNP50K panel — FDR ≤ 0.05


As the base DTA notebook, but significance is Benjamini–Hochberg FDR ≤ 0.05 (per-scan q-values): the Manhattan line is the −log₁₀P at which BH q = 0.05, and candidate/peak calls report q.


2026-07-08

title: zealhmm
text:
TeoNAM — Chen 2019 reproduction
W22 × {TIL01, TIL03, TIL11, TIL14, TIL25}; 1,257 BC1S4 RILs; 118K / 51K SNP panels (v5). The faithful reproduction plus the low-coverage ancestry-caller benchmarks (nNIL, RTIGER, LB-Impute, binhmm, control) and genetic-map / calibration methods.
